/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -flto -Wl,--gc-sections -shared -Wl,-soname,libhubbub.so.1 -o libhubbub.so.1 CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/charset/detect.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/tokeniser/entities.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/tokeniser/tokeniser.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/treebuilder.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/initial.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/before_html.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/before_head.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/in_head.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/in_head_noscript.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/after_head.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/in_body.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/in_table.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/in_caption.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/in_column_group.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/in_table_body.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/in_row.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/in_cell.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/in_select.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/in_select_in_table.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/in_foreign_content.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/after_body.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/in_frameset.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/after_frameset.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/after_after_body.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/after_after_frameset.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/generic_rcdata.c.o "CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/treebuilder/element-type.c.o" CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/utils/string.c.o CMakeFiles/hubbub.dir/src/utils/errors.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/app/build/contrib/libparserutils: ../libparserutils/libparserutils.so.1
